name: TRAVERE THERAPEUTICS INC
summary: TRAVERE THERAPEUTICS INC is a biopharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing therapies for rare diseases. The company's lead product is sparsentan, a dual endothelin angiotensin receptor antagonist (DEARA) for the treatment of rare kidney disorders, with headquarters in San Diego, California. Travere Therapeutics aims to improve the lives of patients with rare diseases through innovative therapies.
